pr.title: feat: switch to OpenNext adapter for Cloudflare Pages deployment
pr.body:
## Summary

Replaces the deprecated `@cloudflare/next-on-pages` with the officially recommended **OpenNext Cloudflare adapter** (`@opennextjs/cloudflare`). This fixes the Cloudflare Pages build error.

**What changed:**
- Added `@opennextjs/cloudflare` dependency and `wrangler` as devDependency
- Created `wrangler.jsonc` config with nodejs_compat flag
- Created `open-next.config.ts` 
- Added Cloudflare build/deploy scripts to `package.json`
- Updated `.gitignore` for `.open-next` and `.dev.vars`

**Build verified locally** — `opennextjs-cloudflare build` completes successfully.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] After merging, update Cloudflare Pages build settings:
  - **Build command:** `npx opennextjs-cloudflare build`
  - **Build output directory:** `.open-next/assets`
- [ ] Verify deployment succeeds on Cloudflare Pages
- [ ] Test the live site works (landing page, settings, chat, content creation)

### Notes
- `@cloudflare/next-on-pages` is deprecated and doesn't support Next.js 16 properly
- OpenNext is the recommended replacement by Cloudflare: https://opennext.js.org/cloudflare
- The `edge` runtime export on `/api/chat` is no longer needed for OpenNext but doesn't hurt to keep

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8fc7e30c5a6543d8aef8ed81385daf74
Requested by: @kelenagi
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
